title: Testing Viability of Benchmark Dark Matter Models for the Galactic Center Excess

models.label: sechyp
models.name: Secluded Hypercharge
models.description: Dirac DM fermion coupled to a dark photon Z' in the secluded regime (m_Z' < m_chi). Annihilation channel chi chi -> Z' Z' (Eq. 24).
models.status: sigma_v function present; no YAML grader (S0 E1=NOT_FOUND — no explicit thermal-anchor BP stated in paper)

models.label: 2hdma
models.name: Two-Higgs-Doublet-Plus-Axion (2HDM+a)
models.description: Dirac DM fermion coupled to a pseudoscalar mediator a and heavy pseudoscalar A via mixing angle theta. Direct detection via triangle diagram (Eq. 47/50).
models.status: Full sigma_SI_exact + sigma_SI_scaling + scaling identities implemented and YAML-wired

experimental_limits.indirect_detection: Fermi-LAT GCE spectrum; INTEGRAL/COMPTEL gamma-ray lines (Fig. 12)
experimental_limits.collider: LHC DM WG VBF + MET (deferred to Phase-2)

computational_tools.monte_carlo: MadGraph5_aMC@NLO with Bauer 2HDM+a UFO (vendored stub; full MG5 run deferred)
computational_tools.relic_density: Not benchmarked (g_D determined dynamically per paper)
computational_tools.loop_functions: scipy.integrate.quad for G(x,0); mpmath.quad for independent ledger validation

phase1_caveats: S0 E1=NOT_FOUND: no secluded-hypercharge thermal-anchor BP in paper text; sechyp YAML tasks dropped
S0 E4=NOT_FOUND: no gamma-ray line numeric anchor; t3_thdma_gamma_line_anchor dropped
S0 E5=NOT_FOUND: no Bauer UFO SHA in paper; vendored stub used (LHC DM WG parameter names)
MG5 VBF task intentionally absent from YAML for Phase-1; re-add in follow-up PR with cached mg_cache.json
